name: discord
description: Discord connector using discord.js — bridges Discord server and DM messages to Sentient brain via Redis

config_fields.name: bot_token
config_fields.description: Discord bot token from Developer Portal

config_fields.name: bot_aliases
config_fields.description: Alternative names the bot responds to

config_fields.name: whitelisted_users
config_fields.description: Discord user IDs allowed to interact

config_fields.name: whitelisted_groups
config_fields.description: Discord channel IDs to process messages from
